{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Twin Guardians of the Twin Star Sect
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Twin Guardians of the Twin Star Sect]] are two [[Remnants]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
